name: JEE Main & Advanced
eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics. Age limit as per NTA norms.
examPattern: JEE Main: 90 MCQs (Physics, Chemistry, Maths). JEE Advanced: 2 papers, mixed question types.
syllabus: NCERT Class 11 & 12 PCM syllabus. Topics in mechanics, calculus, organic/inorganic/physical chemistry.

name: NEET UG
eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology. Minimum 50% aggregate (40% for reserved).
examPattern: 200 MCQs (Physics 45, Chemistry 45, Biology 90). Duration 3 hours 20 minutes.

name: MHT CET
eligibility: Maharashtra domicile or all-India quota. Class 12 with PCM/PCB.
examPattern: 100 MCQs per paper. PCM group for engineering. No negative marking.

name: CUET UG
eligibility: Class 12 pass from recognized board. Domain-specific subject requirements vary.
examPattern: Section IA (Language), Section II (Domain), Section III (General Test). Computer-based.
syllabus: Class 12 domain subjects + general aptitude, logical reasoning, GK.

name: GATE
eligibility: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Science or final year students.
examPattern: 65 questions (MCQs + NAT). Duration 3 hours. Subject-specific paper.
syllabus: Undergraduate engineering syllabus for chosen paper code.

name: CAT
eligibility: Bachelor's degree with 50% marks (45% for reserved categories).
examPattern: VARC (24), DILR (20), QA (22) questions. Duration 2 hours.
syllabus: Reading comprehension, data interpretation, logical reasoning, quantitative aptitude.

name: XAT
examPattern: Verbal, Decision Making, QA, GK sections. Duration 3 hours 10 minutes.
syllabus: English, decision making, quantitative ability, general knowledge.

name: CLAT
eligibility: Class 12 with 45% (40% reserved). Age limit removed.
examPattern: 120 MCQs: English, Current Affairs, Legal Reasoning, Logical Reasoning, Quant.
syllabus: Comprehension, GK, legal aptitude, logical reasoning, elementary maths.

name: NATA
examPattern: Drawing test + MCQs on aptitude and mathematics.
syllabus: Drawing, aesthetic sensitivity, mathematics, architecture awareness.

name: Polytechnic Entrance
eligibility: Class 10 pass with Mathematics and Science.
examPattern: State-specific MCQ papers in Maths, Science, and English.

name: Diploma Engineering CET
eligibility: Class 10 or 12 pass depending on state rules.
examPattern: MCQ-based state CET for diploma admissions.
